title: HJs Chaos Mod
description: A mod for 1.16.5 largely consisting of extra progression and unfunny memes.
body:
# Overview
The HJs Chaos Mod (or just 'Chaos Mod') is a mod focusing on adding more things to do and explore in the progression of the game, via new mobs, biomes, and dimensions. Most of this mod is centered around various meme items, however this mod began production 3 years ago, so much of the content is now dated (and unfunny).

# Features
The Chaos Mod has many features that can be enjoyed by both survival and creative mode players.

### Biomes
Explore the new variety of biomes, such as the Joe Biome, Joe Hills, Chaos Ruins, and Depleted Chaos Biome, each with their own special generation and structures, as well as mobs.

### Mobs
Fight the AmogUs hordes that spawn at night, and beware the mysterious entity that can be seen lurking in the darkness.

### Dimensions
Explore the dangerous joe dimension, or if you afford it, build a portal to the Chaos Dimension, where nothing is as it seems...

### Ores and Armor
Using the new materials found throughout the Chaos Mod, craft powerful armors, each with special effects!

### Weapons
Craft a variety of weapons, some being overpowered, and others being... not so much.

## Creative Mode

### Admin Tools (W.I.P)
The Chaos Mod features some admin tools and items, such as admin weapons and orbital strike launchers.

### Commands (W.I.P)
Want to give yourself exactly 690 amogus items? Theres a command for that!

# Update Plans

### Forward Ports
The Chaos Mod currently only supports 1.16.5. However, a 1.20.1, 1.21, and 1.21.7-8 version is in the works. However, due to large changes between updates (specifically with how biomes generate), not all features will work exactly the same. Once the 1.20.1+ port is stable, production will stop on the 1.16.5 branch.

### New Content?
Progress is slow with the mod, but a new content update is being worked on and should arrive alongside the second version of the 1.20.1 port.

## TLDR
Update 2.2.2 (Current Version) will be updated to 1.20.1, Update 2.3 (next content update) and all future updates will only be on 1.20.1 and above.
